message:
feat(http/h2): stream-level auto WINDOW_UPDATE and send-side flow control

- Add initial_recv_window tracking to Stream for auto WINDOW_UPDATE threshold
- Implement auto_window_update_increment() to detect low recv window (50% watermark)
- Connection::process_data() now emits stream-level WINDOW_UPDATE when threshold crossed
- Send-side flow control: next_frame() clamps DATA to min(conn_window, stream_window)
- Oversized DATA frames are split and re-queued; end_stream deferred to final chunk
- Both connection and stream send windows consumed on frame emission
- 7 new tests covering stream auto WINDOW_UPDATE and send-side enforcement
- Close bd-ha7d

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
